children.heading: Plan revision development costs
children.label: a Plan revision development costs
children.text: The Administrator shall make grants to any organization of local elected officials with transportation or air quality maintenance planning responsibilities recognized by the State under for payment of the reasonable costs of developing a plan revision under this part.section 7504(a) of this title

children.heading: Uses of grant funds
children.label: b Uses of grant funds
children.text: The amount granted to any organization under subsection (a) shall be 100 percent of any additional costs of developing a plan revision under this part for the first two fiscal years following receipt of the grant under this paragraph, and shall supplement any funds available under Federal law to such organization for transportation or air quality maintenance planning. Grants under this section shall not be used for construction.
